{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Future Fall
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Future Fall]] is one of the names locals have for the [[Aetheric occurrence]] on [[Nezarin]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c1">''The Captain'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
